name: Kahlua Mousse
recipeIngredient: 1 pound dark sweet chocolate, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler, melt chocolate and butter over simmering water.
2. In a large bowl, combine sugar, egg yolks, Kahlua, and coffee powder. Blend in the melted chocolate mixture.
3. Whip the cream until stiff peaks form; gently fold into the Kahlua-chocolate mixture.
4. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form; carefully fold into the mixture.
5. Spoon the mousse into a serving bowl or dessert glasses. Refrigerate for 4 hours or overnight, garnishing if desired.
